title: mespilus oxyacantha subsp. monogyna
intro: Mespilus oxyacantha subsp. monogyna, also known as the single-stemmed hawthorn or May hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular issues due to its rich content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Mespilus oxyacantha subsp. monogyna include lowering blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and reducing the risk of heart disease. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as capsules, teas, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
